summary: Completed frontend testing of Nuku Creative website with new hero image slider, green italic text styling, and edge gradient effects. Most features working correctly with one minor navigation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Prev/Next navigation buttons have timing/logic issues - don't advance slides in expected sequence (jumps from index 0 to 2 instead of 0 to 1)
ui_bugs.workaround: Dot navigation works correctly as alternative

passed_tests: Hero image slider with 4 images displays correctly
Slider dot indicators work and show active state
Green italic text visible for 'creative', 'systems', 'modern' in hero
Edge gradient blurs visible on page background
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix slider prev/next button logic to ensure proper sequential navigation. The buttons currently have timing issues with the auto-rotation timer causing unexpected slide jumps.
